actionUnits.condition: Exercise AttachToElevator (MonoBehaviour id: 2013310826; script guid: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77) OnTriggerEnter and OnTriggerExit on 'platform2 (2)'. Current scene config: BoxCollider id 2013310828 with m_IsTrigger=0; Has_Rigidbody=False; MonoBehaviour.player=null. Note: For OnTriggerEnter/Exit to fire in Unity 3D physics, one collider must be marked IsTrigger and at least one of the two interacting objects must have a Rigidbody. Also the script compares 'gameObject == player', which only becomes true if the platform object itself is assigned to 'player' (currently null). With current config, even if triggers fire, the if-branch will not execute any parenting logic. This Trigger action attempts to enter and then exit the collider volume to cover OnTriggerEnter and OnTriggerExit message handlers.
